name: Marinated Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Italian dressing and pepper in a medium bowl, stirring well.
2. Add the cucumber, onion, radishes, and parsley to the bowl. Gently toss until all ingredients are coated evenly with the dressing.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 4 hours to allow the flavors to meld together.
4. Before serving, use a slotted spoon to remove the salad from the refrigerator and discard any excess dressing on the utensil before serving.
This recipe yields approximately 5 servings, with each serving containing about 1/2 cup of salad. The dish is free of cholesterol, has minimal calories (21), and provides 4 grams of carbohydrates, no protein, trace amounts of fat, fiber, and a very low sodium content of 5 mg.
